infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This driver app needs your live location to show real GPS in dispatcher and calculate ETA.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This driver app needs background GPS so dispatcher can keep seeing the vehicle even when the phone screen is not on.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This driver app needs camera access to capture required trip and profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This driver app needs photo library access so drivers can attach existing trip and profile photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This driver app needs your live location to show real GPS in dispatcher and calculate ETA.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This driver app needs background GPS so dispatcher can keep seeing the vehicle even when the phone screen is off.

plugins.photosPermission: This driver app needs photo access so drivers can attach trip and profile photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: This driver app needs camera access to take required trip and profile photos.
